KF Left Near Deku Gossip Stone.message: They say that Biggoron crafts a Gold Skulltula Token.

KF Right Near Deku Gossip Stone.message: They say that zombies beneath the earth guard Faron's Wind.

KF Gossip Stone.location: Dodongos Cavern GS Side Room Near Lower Lizalfos

KF Storms Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that Dodongo's Cavern is on the way of the hero.

LW Gossip Stone.message: They say that plundering Kokiri Forest is a foolish choice.

They say OTR stands for
Over the Rainbow

Market Left Center Gossip Stone.message: They say that Darunia's dance leads to a Piece of Heart.

HC Near Malon Gossip Stone.message: They say that Nayru's Passion can be found at the Lost Woods.

HC Rock Wall Gossip Stone.message: They say that the crater's melody is the Serenade of Water.

HC Storm Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say Ganon's tail is vulnerable to nuts, arrows, swords, explosives, hammers... ...sticks, seeds, boomerangs... ...rods, shovels, iron balls, angry bees...

Kak Open Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that Ice Cavern is on the way of the hero.

Graveyard Gossip Stone.message: They say that a spider among ghosts in the Forest Temple guards a Gold Skulltula Token.

DMT Gossip Stone.message: They say that Forest Temple hoards a Piece of the Triforce.

DMT Storms Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that Deku Tree is on the way of the hero.

GC Maze Gossip Stone.message: They say that Kakariko Village is on the way of the hero.

GC Medigoron Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Graveyard is on the way of the hero.

DMC Upper Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that a ravaged village mourns with the Song of Time.

Ganondorf Hint.message: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me by reflecting my lightning bolts and unleashing the arrows from Shadow Temple!
Ganondorf Hint.location: Shadow Temple GS Like Like Room

Ganondorf Joke.message:
I've learned this spell,
it's really neat,
I'll keep it later
for your treat!

Sheik in Ganons Castle Hint.message: I overheard Ganondorf say that he misplaced the Light Arrows in Shadow Temple.
Sheik in Ganons Castle Hint.location: Shadow Temple GS Like Like Room

Dampe's Diary Hint.message:
Whoever reads this, please enter Lake Hylia. I will let you have my stretching, shrinking keepsake. I'm waiting for you.
--Dampé

Treasure Chest Game Greg Hint.message:
By the way, if you're interested, I saw the shiniest Green Rupee somewhere in Kakariko Village. It's said to have mysterious powers... But then, it could just be another regular rupee.
Oh well.

ToT Altar as Child.message:
3 Spiritual Stone's found in Hyrule... Forest Temple... Spirit Temple... Fire Temple... Ye who may become a Hero...
The path to the future is open...

ToT Altar as Adult.message: An awakening voice from the Sacred Realm will call those destined to be Sages, who dwell in the five temples. Dodongo's Cavern... Shadow Temple... Jabu-Jabu's Belly... Link's Pocket... Deku Tree... Water Temple... The awakened ones will await for the Hero to collect 4 Medallions. And the evil one's key will be given to the Hero once the Triforce is completed. Together with the Hero of Time, the awakened ones will return the light of peace to the world...

sphere 00.Adult Spawn -> Temple of Time: Market Treasure Chest Game from Market
